summary: Backend API testing completed for Supervisor Role feature. 19/20 tests passed (95% success rate). All supervisor features working correctly: user registration with supervisor role, team management, supervision notes CRUD, and escalation workflow.

minor.issue: Health endpoint returns 404 - endpoint doesn't exist
minor.note: Not a bug - just no dedicated health endpoint. Root endpoint / works fine.

critical_code_review_comments: Supervisor role correctly added to UserCreate model pattern: ^(admin|supervisor|counsellor|peer)$ (server.py:1425)
Login redirect correctly routes supervisor to /staff portal (auth.py:268)
Supervision team endpoint correctly filters counsellors and peers (server.py:4380-4406)
Supervision notes have proper access control - supervisors see only their own notes (server.py:4451-4453)
Escalations have proper role restrictions - only counsellors/peers can create, only supervisors/admins can acknowledge/resolve (server.py:4508-4610)
TokenResponse model in models/schemas.py correctly includes redirect field for staff portal routing
seed_data_creation: Test created multiple supervisor users during testing. Existing supervisor@radiocheck.me confirmed working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supervisor role fully implemented and tested. All 9 features from review request verified: POST /api/auth/register with supervisor role, GET /api/supervision/team, POST/GET /api/supervision/notes, POST /api/escalations, GET /api/escalations, PATCH /api/escalations/{id}/acknowledge, PATCH /api/escalations/{id}/resolve, and login redirect for supervisor. Static files (admin-site, staff-portal) are served separately.

supervisor_registration.details: Admin can create users with 'supervisor' role. Role pattern validation works correctly.

supervisor_login_redirect.details: Supervisor login returns redirect: '/staff' for staff portal access

supervision_team_view.details: Supervisors and admins can view team members (counsellors and peers). Non-supervisors denied (403).

supervision_notes_create.details: Supervisors can create 1:1 supervision notes for staff members

supervision_notes_view.details: Supervisors see their own notes, admins see all. Filter by staff_id works.

escalations_create.details: Counsellors and peers can create escalations. Supervisors correctly denied.

escalations_view.details: Staff see their own escalations, supervisors/admins see all.

escalations_acknowledge.details: Supervisors can acknowledge escalations. Status changes to 'acknowledged', supervisor_id set.

escalations_resolve.details: Supervisors can resolve escalations with optional resolution notes. Status changes to 'resolved'.
